reconciliation.horizontal: Full-sheet and focused JPEG votes were unstable, and the lossless recheck majority followed the large rotating head/hair silhouette rather than the paired iris controls. No coefficient flip was made: both iris-plus-highlight controls independently have positive 090-minus-270 screen-X deltas, three probe-sign reviewers agreed on the local axes, and native-size final review found no facial separation.
reconciliation.vertical: All three initial blind reviewers passed the vertical pair, and both iris controls plus the outer head wrapper have the required negative rendered screen-Y deltas.
reconciliation.coefficient_action: unchanged; physical control-coordinate evidence overrides the unstable silhouette-based horizontal vote
